title: Israel targets Iran factory, alleges fentanyl use in chemical weapons; Tehran denies
summary_full: Israel claims it struck an Iranian pharmaceutical facility, alleging it supplied fentanyl for a chemical weapons program. Iran confirmed the strike on the Tofigh Daru factory, asserting it produces only hospital drugs. Both nations reported the incident occurred on Tuesday.
